summary: Set 046 Session 2 shipped deliverable (a) — the writer-side totalSessions:null change — and absorbed an operator incident mid-session: the Set 033/036 hard-coordination toast blocked staff onboarding when a Codex hook on a second machine fired the H3 refusal path. The H3 + chatSessionId-mismatch enforcement is now opt-in (DABBLER_ENFORCE_CHECKOUT_COORDINATION=1); mechanics are preserved. The original 7-session arc collapsed to 2 sessions; deliverables (b), (c), live cost, idle time, state-divergence pill, and needs-migration expansion are all CANCELLED. Future work in this area routes through Set 048+ per feedback_audit_then_spec_for_substantial_features. Cumulative Set 046 routed cost: $0.183 of $5 NTE (~3.7%). Set 046's writer change rides Set 047's release; no version bump for this set.

reason.specifics: Set 047 (per-session orchestrator + Set 033/036 rollback + watcher-scope removal) is the next active set. Session 1 of 047 is the cross-provider devil's-advocate audit of the new design.
